evals.prompt: Create a Structurizr DSL workspace for an e-commerce platform with one person (Customer), one software system (Storefront), and three containers (Web App, API, PostgreSQL). Include system context and container views with stable view keys.
evals.expected_output: A valid DSL workspace that defines model elements, relationships, and two correctly scoped views with explicit keys.

evals.prompt: I have this DSL and it fails: `workspace { model { api = container "API" } views { container shop { include * } } }`. Fix it with minimal edits and explain the error.
evals.expected_output: A corrected DSL that places container inside a software system, uses valid identifiers/scope, and a concise explanation of the structural issue.

evals.prompt: Refactor my noisy Structurizr container view to avoid `include *`, keep only user-facing and data-flow-relevant elements, and add a style block for Person and Container tags.
evals.expected_output: A focused container view using targeted include/exclude logic plus a clean styles block with meaningful defaults.
